source.name: Rock Beats Paper
source.description: As a Lithoid empire, show the Galactic Community exactly what you think of that strongly worded letter.
source.requirement: As a Lithoid empire, execute or eat the envoys of the Galactic Community.
source.hint: The strongly worded letter event will happen at the start of the next decade if in breach of galactic law.

conditions.notes: Primary species class must be Lithoid.

curation.planner_notes: Best considered during a Lithoid run.

source.name: Humble Pie
source.description: Humiliate an empire that is in the Supremacy diplomatic stance.
source.requirement: Humiliate an empire that is in the Supremacy diplomatic stance.
source.hint: Use a Humiliation war goal against an eligible target.

warnings: Target behavior may change before war declaration.
